response.justification: The candidate's technical profile comfortably covers the stack — strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, REST, SQL databases, Kubernetes, AWS, and even recent LLM/MCP agentic tooling experience matching the nice-to-haves. However, he is a Staff/Senior engineer with nearly 20 years of experience applying to an entry-level position, which raises serious concerns about overqualification, compensation misalignment, and retention. He is Berlin-based, which suits the high on-site requirement, but his basic German may matter for a German consulting-adjacent domain.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple product companies
Covers nearly all nice-to-haves: LLM/API integration, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker
Strong engineering culture background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, mentoring)
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an entry-level role — flight and salary-expectation risk
No demonstrated PostgreSQL or Nest.js specifically (MongoDB/MySQL/SQL listed instead)
Frequent job changes in recent years may signal short expected tenure

key_factors.factor: Full coverage of required and nice-to-have tech stack
Local presence in Berlin fitting on-site requirement
